params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 perplexity V7-A envelope verification (deployed 2026-05-06 18:59:30 KST). HP-Perplexity-O1 test: added 'ownership':'owner' + 'visibility':'private' fields to all 5 SSE message data blocks. Spec: proposals/perplexity-ownership-permission-envelope-spec-2026-05-06.md. Pipeline_state diagnosis: 'private-thread modal blocking bubble render without ownership/permission field'. Test: does Perplexity SPA now skip private-thread modal AND render warning bubble? Engine size grew 4262→4495 template / 4472 deployed bytes (5 occurrences of new fields).

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe POST /rest/sse/perplexity_ask response (~4472 bytes V7-A SSE)
3. Watch for private-thread modal — V7-A SUCCESS = modal absent OR auto-dismissed
4. Verify warning bubble: Korean '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' visible as assistant message

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + no private-thread modal + mission HELD
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_modal_only_dismissed: modal absent but bubble silent — escalate to V7-B (read_write_token) or V7-C (private_thread_metadata block)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_modal_persists: ownership field insufficient — escalate V7-D (combined all-in)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine response — revert to original perplexity_sse template (preserved in spec doc)

notes: 48차 perplexity V7-A ownership/permission test. Parallels mistral V5-A + notion V6-A pattern. Variants V7-B/C/D queued in spec as fallbacks.
